stance: Risk-on PSU/resource core, but rotate out of negative-revision oil-marketing & lagging PSU cyclicals and use the diversified mandate to add high-revision large/mid names for breadth.
experience_note: Early round (no prior review to grade). I am pre-registering that the high-revision resource core (ONGC/NMDC/Coal/Nalco/GujGas) should outperform the negative-revision oil-marketing sleeve I am exiting over the next 1-3 months; if instead the deep-value, deeply-downgraded names (HPCL/BPCL/IOC, PNB) rally and my high-ARM adds lag, that is evidence the revision tilt is being swamped by a cheap-cyclical mean-reversion regime and I should lean more on z_val and less on ARM. I am watching: (1) whether my conviction-sizing actually correlates with forward winners (conviction-IC), and (2) whether the broad-market diversifiers (Coforge/Grasim/Asian Paints/Gland) add the breadth I intend or just dilute the PSU thesis without paying.
